rewrite.rewritten: Qatar has announced the launch of a new event, with the Ministry of Culture and Sports highlighting that it is expected to attract a large number of participants. The event is anticipated to be one of the major highlights of the year, featuring a distinguished line-up of activities.
changes_summary: Replaced 'huge new event' with 'launch of a new event'
Replaced 'amazing' with 'highlighted' and added attribution to Ministry of Culture and Sports
Replaced 'Lots of people are expected' with 'expected to attract a large number of participants'
Replaced 'one of the biggest things this year' with 'one of the major highlights of the year'
Replaced 'You won't believe how cool the line-up is' with 'featuring a distinguished line-up of activities'
added_attributions: the Ministry of Culture and Sports
